title: Environmental controls (OKOLAB) Bold-Line 3
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5345e","text":"Start-up procedure for IX85-LTTL microscopes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"52olv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6btlb","text":"Evident IX85 inverted widefield microscope for live cell imaging.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4p77l","text":"Micro-Manager 2.0 software","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4jfgf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Environmental conditions are controlled by the touchpad controller OKOLAB touch pad controller
Check humidifier water level, top-up with ddH 2 O if needed Vibration-free humdifier (there are no bubbles!)
Start gas flow and check CO 2 concentration set point. cog: Settings select: Gas Pause Start the gas flow select: Gas
Check temperature. Green lights when environment has stabilised
Mount sample Mounted slide inside the micro-environment chamber
Replace stage inserts Stage inserts and adjustment screws
creator: Matt Renshaw
